name: Biscotti
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Beat cream cheese, margarine, sugar, vanilla, and anise extract in a large mixing bowl at medium speed with an electric mixer until well blended.
3. Gradually add combined dry ingredients; mix well. Stir in almonds.
4. On a well-floured surface, shape dough into three 12 x 1-1/2 inch logs. Place logs, 2 inches apart, on greased and floured cookie sheet.
5. Bake 15 to 20 minutes or until light golden brown. (Dough will spread and flatten slightly during baking.) Cool slightly.
6. Diagonally cut each log into 3/4-inch slices. Place on cookie sheet.
7. Continue baking 5 to 10 minutes or until light golden brown. Cool on a wire rack.
